title: Sans' Cobblemon Structures
body:
Still in very early development but I started this as a hobby/side project so I am learning as I go. The goal is to just have more stuff to keep you interested while playing Cobblemon(and obtain legendaries)! 


Structures in the pack right now:
Cobblemon village (/locate structure scs:cobblemon_village)
Regi Temples (/locate structure scs:regi---)

Support thread in the Cobblemon Discord: [https://discordapp.com/channels/934267676354834442/1333963589295407217]
